name: Devesto — Friends! (With benefits...)
description:
Devesto - Die of Death

You're friends with benefits with the F3X guy! Pretty nice huh?

Did I get addicted to playing Die of Death? Yes.

Am I into Devesto? Hell yeah.

Maybe I'll be making another Roblox related bot? Who knows...

(leave a comment about the bot, i was sleepy as fuck while making this bot, so don't mind if there are grammatical errors and lore mistakes here and there, im not changing anyways...)
